headline: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
summary: Lorde criticized AI glasses during her performance in Madrid. She likely targeted festival sponsor Ray-Ban's Meta AI smartglasses. The singer deemed the AI-powered eyewear "not sexy."

headline: Shall We Go On Sinning So That Grace May Increase? is hypnotic, healing, and hopeful
summary: Drew Daniel (Matmos) released a new album as The Soft Pink Truth. The album is titled 'Shall We Go On Sinning So That Grace May Increase?'. Reviewers describe it as hypnotic, healing, and hopeful.

headline: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
summary: Apple's defunct self-driving car project significantly influenced its AI chip development. The program highlighted the need for robust on-device AI processing. This ultimately led to Apple's current powerful AI-capable silicon.

headline: One of SteelSeries’ best gaming headsets is over $100 off
summary: SteelSeries' Arctis Nova Pro Wireless gaming headset is currently on sale. The price is $239.99, saving buyers over $100. It's available for Xbox (compatible with PS, PC, Switch) and PlayStation (compatible with PC, Switch).

headline: Sam Neill Dies at 78
summary: Acclaimed actor Sam Neill has passed away at 78. He was widely recognized for his iconic role in 'Jurassic Park'. Neill also starred in many other classic films.

headline: Rick and Morty Season 9, Episodes 6-8 Review & Recap
summary: A review covers episodes 6-8 of Rick and Morty Season 9. The episodes are analyzed, with one standing out as a clear winner. Fans can catch up on the latest plot developments and humor.

headline: The Vampire Lestat Just Gave Us a Jaw-Dropping Penultimate Episode
summary: Episode 6 of 'The Vampire Lestat' delivered a shocking penultimate episode. The AMC series achieved one of its best sequences yet. This sets up an intense finale for the current season.

headline: House of the Dragon Season 3, Episode 4 Recap and Review
summary: Episode 4 of House of the Dragon Season 3 has been reviewed. The installment is described as meaty and full of schemes. It strategically shifts pieces for future plot developments.

headline: More than 2,700 people may have died in exceptional May and June heatwaves in England and Wales
summary: Over 2,700 deaths may be linked to recent heatwaves in England and Wales. Early estimates suggest a significant toll from the exceptionally hot weather. The deaths occurred during May and June.

headline: Mahmood to set out plan to deport grooming gang leader
summary: Mahmood plans to outline a strategy for deporting a grooming gang leader. Calls for the deportation of Rochdale ringleader Shabir Ahmed have intensified. Ahmed was recently released from prison.

headline: At least 27 killed, 22 critically injured in Bangkok bar fire
summary: A devastating fire at a Bangkok bar killed at least 27 people. Another 22 individuals sustained critical injuries. Patrons were seen fleeing through flames in the Chatuchak district.

headline: Police say no suggestion of political motive in Widdecombe killing after new arrest
summary: Police have arrested a 28-year-old man in connection with the Widdecombe killing. Authorities are not seeking any further suspects. They state there is no indication of a political motive.
